name_en: Votive plaque (ema) depicting Katō Kiyomasa slaying a tiger
description_en: A votive picture plaque (ema), classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Higashikurume City. It is located at Minamisawa 3-5-8, Higashikurume City.

name_en: Ridgepole plaque dated Jōō 3
description_en: A ridgepole plaque (munafuda), classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Higashikurume City. It is located at Minamisawa 3-5-8, Higashikurume City.

name_en: Portrait of Taigu Oshō, founding priest of Beishin-ji Temple
description_en: A portrait painting, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Higashikurume City. It is located at Saiwaichō 4-2-40, Higashikurume City.

name_en: Group of artifacts excavated from the Mukaiyama Site
description_en: A group of excavated artifacts, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Higashikurume City.

name_en: Group of artifacts excavated from the Shinmeiyama Minami Site
description_en: A group of excavated artifacts, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Higashikurume City.

name_en: Group of artifacts excavated from the Rokusen Site
description_en: A group of excavated artifacts, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Higashikurume City.

name_en: Survey field notebooks for the land-tax reform
description_en: Survey field notebooks related to the land-tax reform, classified as a tangible cultural property. They are municipally designated by Higashikurume City.

name_en: Documents relating to the construction of the Murano family residence
description_en: A set of documents relating to the construction of the Murano family residence, classified as a tangible cultural property. They are municipally designated by Higashikurume City. They are located at Yanagikubo 4, Higashikurume City.

name_en: Former main gate of Jōboku-in Temple
description_en: A temple gate, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Higashikurume City. It is located at Daimonchō 1-3-4, Higashikurume City.

name_en: Survey record of village roads
description_en: A survey record of village roads, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Higashikurume City.

name_en: Painting of the Seven Lucky Gods at a banquet
description_en: A painting depicting the Seven Lucky Gods at a banquet, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Higashikurume City. It is located at Yanagikubo 4, Higashikurume City.

name_en: Monument of the Yanagikubo plum grove
description_en: A monument, classified as a historic site in the monuments category. It is municipally designated by Higashikurume City. It is located at Yanagikubo 4-15-16, Higashikurume City.

name_en: Gravesite of the Kamiya family
description_en: A family gravesite, classified as a historic site in the monuments category. It is municipally designated by Higashikurume City. It is located at Daimonchō 1-3-4, Higashikurume City.

name_en: Gravesite of the Suzuki family
description_en: A family gravesite, classified as a historic site in the monuments category. It is municipally designated by Higashikurume City. It is located at Daimonchō 1-3-4, Higashikurume City.

name_en: Koyamadai archaeological site
description_en: An archaeological site, classified as a historic site in the monuments category. It is municipally designated by Higashikurume City. It is located at Koyama 1-10, Higashikurume City.

name_en: Fudekozuka (memorial mound erected by pupils)
description_en: A fudekozuka, a memorial mound erected by pupils, classified as a historic site in the monuments category. It is municipally designated by Higashikurume City. It is located at Yanagikubo 5-6, Higashikurume City.

name_en: Site of the Seikei School
description_en: A former school site, classified as a historic spot in the monuments category. It is municipally designated by Higashikurume City. It is located at Hachimanchō 2-10-10, Higashikurume City.

name_en: Site of the Kyōritsu School
description_en: A former school site, classified as a historic spot in the monuments category. It is municipally designated by Higashikurume City. It is located at Honchō 4-13-16, Higashikurume City.

name_en: Site of the Yōryūsawa Palace
description_en: A former palace site, classified as a historic spot in the monuments category. It is municipally designated by Higashikurume City. It is located at Hachimanchō 2-11, Higashikurume City.

name_en: Site of the Musashino Railway siding line
description_en: A former railway siding site, classified as a historic spot in the monuments category. It is municipally designated by Higashikurume City. It is located at Gakuenchō, Higashikurume City.

name_en: Site of the Kitatama Army signal station
description_en: A former army signal station site, classified as a historic spot in the monuments category. It is municipally designated by Higashikurume City. It is located at Maezawa 5-chōme, Higashikurume City.

name_en: Site of the Navy Ōwada communications unit
description_en: A former naval communications unit site, classified as a historic spot in the monuments category. It is municipally designated by Higashikurume City. It is located at Uenohara, Higashikurume City.

name_en: Kaya (Japanese nutmeg-yew) tree of Jōboku-in Temple
description_en: A kaya (Japanese nutmeg-yew) tree, classified as a natural monument in the monuments category. It is municipally designated by Higashikurume City. It is located at Daimonchō 1-3-4, Higashikurume City.

name_romaji: Nihon Joshi Daigaku Naruse Kinen Kōdō Ittō
name_en: Naruse Memorial Auditorium of Japan Women's University (1 building)
description_en: A building, classified as a tangible cultural property (architecture). It was designated by Bunkyo Ward on November 1, 1974. It is located at Mejirodai 2-8-1, Bunkyo Ward.

name_en: Sutra repository of Kichijō-ji Temple (1 building)
description_en: A temple sutra repository, classified as a tangible cultural property (architecture). It was designated by Bunkyo Ward on November 1, 1974. It is located at Honkomagome 3-19-17, Bunkyo Ward.

name_en: Daishi Hall of Gokoku-ji Temple (1 building)
description_en: A temple hall, classified as a tangible cultural property (architecture). It was designated by Bunkyo Ward on November 1, 1975. It is located at Ōtsuka 5-40-1, Bunkyo Ward.

name_en: Yakushi Hall of Gokoku-ji Temple (1 building)
description_en: A temple hall, classified as a tangible cultural property (architecture). It was designated by Bunkyo Ward on November 1, 1975. It is located at Ōtsuka 5-40-1, Bunkyo Ward.

name_en: Outer main gate (sōmon) of Gokoku-ji Temple (1 building)
description_en: A temple gate, classified as a tangible cultural property (architecture). It was designated by Bunkyo Ward on November 1, 1976. It is located at Ōtsuka 5-40-1, Bunkyo Ward.

name_en: Bell tower of Gokoku-ji Temple (1 building), with temple bell
description_en: A temple bell tower with its bell, classified as a tangible cultural property (architecture). It was designated by Bunkyo Ward on November 1, 1976. It is located at Ōtsuka 5-40-1, Bunkyo Ward.

name_romaji: Kōanji Hondō oyobi Kuri Kaku Ittō tsuketari Monjo Ni
name_en: Main hall and priests' quarters of Kōan-ji Temple (1 building each), with 2 documents
description_en: A temple main hall and priests' quarters with two accompanying documents, classified as a tangible cultural property (architecture). They were designated by Bunkyo Ward on November 1, 1977. They are located at Yushima 4-12-13, Bunkyo Ward.

name_en: Front gate (Shudenmon) of Saikyō-ji Temple (1 building)
description_en: A temple gate, classified as a tangible cultural property (architecture). It was designated by Bunkyo Ward on November 1, 1980. It is located at Mukōgaoka 2-1-10, Bunkyo Ward.

name_en: Niō gate of Gokoku-ji Temple (1 building)
description_en: A temple gate, classified as a tangible cultural property (architecture). It was designated by Bunkyo Ward on November 1, 1982. It is located at Ōtsuka 5-40-1, Bunkyo Ward.

name_romaji: Kyū Naruse Jinzō Jūtaku (Nihon Joshi Daigaku Naruse Kinenkan Bunkan) Ittō tsuketari Kagu Jūyonten
name_en: Former Naruse Jinzō residence (annex of the Naruse Memorial Hall, Japan Women's University; 1 building), with 14 pieces of furniture
description_en: A residential building with 14 accompanying pieces of furniture, classified as a tangible cultural property (architecture). It was designated by Bunkyo Ward on October 1, 2007. It is located at Mejirodai 2-8-1, Bunkyo Ward.

name_romaji: Kyū Iseya Shichiten Mise, Dozō, Zashikitō Santō tsuketari Munafuda (Mise) Ichimai
name_en: Former Iseya pawnshop: shop, storehouse, and parlor buildings (3 buildings), with 1 ridgepole plaque (shop)
description_en: A group of three buildings with one accompanying ridgepole plaque, classified as a tangible cultural property (architecture). They were designated by Bunkyo Ward on March 1, 2016. They are located at Hongō 5-9-4, Bunkyo Ward.

name_romaji: Murakawake Jūtaku Gotō Niki tsuketari Kenchiku Kankei Shiryō Nijūyonten
name_en: Murakawa family residence (5 buildings and 2 structures), with 24 construction-related documents
description_en: A residential complex of five buildings and two structures with 24 accompanying construction-related documents, classified as a tangible cultural property (architecture). It was designated by Bunkyo Ward on March 1, 2017. It is located at Mejirodai 3-18-9, Bunkyo Ward.

name_romaji: Kenpon Chakushoku Jūroku Rakan Zu Jūroppuku
name_en: Sixteen Arhats, color on silk (16 hanging scrolls)
description_en: A set of paintings, classified as a tangible cultural property (painting). They were designated by Bunkyo Ward on November 1, 1974. They are located at Yushima 4-1-8, Bunkyo Ward.

name_romaji: Kenpon Chakushoku Ryōken Sōjō Zō Ippuku
name_en: Portrait of the priest Ryōken, color on silk (1 hanging scroll)
description_en: A portrait painting, classified as a tangible cultural property (painting). It was designated by Bunkyo Ward on November 1, 1975. It is located at Ōtsuka 5-40-1, Bunkyo Ward.

name_en: Votive picture plaques (16 plaques)
description_en: A set of votive picture plaques (ema), classified as a tangible cultural property (painting). They were designated by Bunkyo Ward on November 1, 1975. They are located at Ōtsuka 5-40-1, Bunkyo Ward.

name_romaji: Kenpon Chakushoku Ryūkō Sōjō Zō Ippuku
name_en: Portrait of the priest Ryūkō, color on silk (1 hanging scroll)
description_en: A portrait painting, classified as a tangible cultural property (painting). It was designated by Bunkyo Ward on November 1, 1976. It is located at Ōtsuka 5-40-1, Bunkyo Ward.

name_romaji: Shihon Bokuga Chakushoku Kasuga no Tsubone Zō Ippuku
name_en: Portrait of Kasuga no Tsubone, ink and color on paper (1 hanging scroll)
description_en: A portrait painting, classified as a tangible cultural property (painting). It was designated by Bunkyo Ward on November 1, 1976. It is located at Yushima 4-1-8, Bunkyo Ward.
